title: fix(governance): CODEOWNERS point at real owner @HanzoRazer so code-owner review can enforce
intent: Make the .github/CODEOWNERS rules functional. The four governance-path rules were owned by @toolbox-governance, which GitHub's /codeowners/errors API flags as 'Unknown owner' on every line: the repo is user-owned (HanzoRazer, type User) so no team can exist, and no such user exists as a collaborator. An unresolvable owner can never be assigned as a required reviewer, so 'Require review from Code Owners' would enforce nothing. This replaces @toolbox-governance with @HanzoRazer (verified valid user with admin on the repo). This removes ONE of CI-RED-021's blockers; CI-RED-021 still closes only after branch protection/ruleset also requires PRs, status checks, and code-owner review with no routine bypass/direct-push path.

diff_articulation.what_changed: (1) .github/CODEOWNERS: replace the non-resolvable owner @toolbox-governance with @HanzoRazer on all four governance-path rules (fence baselines, services/api/app/ci/**, scripts/architecture/**). (2) this per-PR CBSP21 manifest declaring the config change. No product, application, or CI-logic change; only the CODEOWNERS owner token changes.
diff_articulation.why_not_redundant: Without a resolvable owner, enabling 'Require review from Code Owners' on main would be a silent no-op for these governance paths. This is the prerequisite content fix that makes code-owner enforcement possible before branch protection is configured.

commands_run: local: python scripts/ci/check_cbsp21_patch_input.py --base origin/main --head HEAD -> PASS (selects this manifest)
local: python scripts/ci/check_cbsp21_gate.py --changed-files <origin/main...HEAD files> -> 100% coverage PASS
CI/API witness: gh api repos/HanzoRazer/luthiers-toolbox/codeowners/errors -> no 'Unknown owner' errors for the four governance lines after merge

files.intent: Replace unresolvable @toolbox-governance with real owner @HanzoRazer so code-owner review can enforce on governance paths.
files.behavior_change: none - review-routing metadata only; no runtime or CI-logic change

files.intent: Per-PR CBSP21 manifest declaring this CODEOWNERS config change.
